strengths: ~19 years of hands-on software engineering across web, embedded, low-latency, and infrastructure systems — exceeds the 15-year requirement
Founder experience (GISCollective, 2016–present) plus recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work shows entrepreneurial drive and current AI exposure
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and community leadership through conference talks, workshops, and courses — aligns with the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategic leadership advising executives, customers, and partners
No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI-powered products at scale — MCP tooling contributions are recent and narrow relative to the JD's bar
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is applied rather than platform-strategy level

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile hands-on engineer with more than enough years of experience, genuine founder experience, and emerging AI-agent tooling work. However, this role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and experience advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption — none of which the resume evidences. The profile fits a senior/staff product engineering role far better than a principal AI strategy role, so the gap in seniority and AI standing outweighs the solid engineering foundation.
